title: sonchus sinuatus
intro: Sonchus sinuatus, also known as the wavy prickly lettuce or wavy lettuce, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is characterized by its wavy-edged leaves and tall stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Sonchus sinuatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels.
